prompt: This framework has to tell apart a fixed page address from one that carries variable, bracketed segments, and it also has to put a set of such addresses into a stable priority order. Where does it decide whether a single address contains variable segments, and where does it sort a collection of addresses into their matching precedence?

evidence.claim: decides whether one address has variable segments

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
